cases.prompt: Supabase vs Firebase 리서치 해줘. 한국 스타트업 MVP 기준

assertions.text: The agent compares at least 3 products (including both named ones plus at least one more like PocketBase or Appwrite).
Every claim has a citation with URL and date. No unsourced claims.
The agent saves results to docs/research/<date>-<topic>.md.
